title: typeKeplerOrbit
description: Keplerian orbit parameters required to calculate satellite position

m0.description: m_0: Mean anomaly at reference time.  Units: rad

deltaN.description: delta_n: Mean motion difference from computed value.  Units: rad/s

sqrtA.description: sqrt_a: Square root of semi-major axis.  Units: sqrt(m)

omega0.description: omega_0: Longitude of ascending node of orbit plane at weekly epoch  Units: rad

i0.description: i_0: Inclination angle at reference time.  Units: rad

iDot.description: i_dot: Rate of change of inclination angle.  Units: rad

omega.description: omega: Argument of perigee.  Units: rad

omegaDot.description: omega_dot: Rate of right ascension.  Units: rad/s

cUc.description: c_uc: Amplitude of cosine harmonic correction terms to the argument of latitude.  Units: rad

cUs.description: c_us: Amplitude of sine harmonic correction terms to the argument of latitude.  Units: rad

cRc.description: c_rc: Amplitude of cosine harmonic correction terms to the orbit radius.  Units: m

cRs.description: c_rs: Amplitude of sine harmonic correction terms to the orbit radius.  Units: m

cIc.description: c_ic: Amplitude of cosine harmonic correction terms to the angle of inclination.  Units: rad

cIs.description: c_is: Amplitude of sine harmonic correction terms to the angle of inclination.  Units: rad

tOe.description: t_oe: Ephemeris reference time.  Units: s
